zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tame是John Tame和Jane Tilly的女兒，於1380年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾恩豪。她於1400年與Nicholas De Semarc III在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾恩豪結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾恩豪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tame是John Tame和Jane Tilly的女儿，于1380年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾恩豪。她于1400年与Nicholas De Semarc III在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾恩豪结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年在她的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾恩豪。

nameMeanings.name: Tame
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name primarily from Thame in Oxfordshire, or the river Thame which flows through it, but perhaps occasionally from one or more of the three English rivers named Tame, in Staffordshire/Warwickshire, Yorkshire, and Yorkshire/Lancashire. The river names are probably all related to the Indo-European root tā-, tə- ‘melt, flow’. Thame in Oxfordshire takes its name from the river Thame.

variants.name: Thames
meanings: topographic name from the river Thames in southeastern England. The river name is related to the Indo-European root tā-, tə- ‘melt, flow’.
variant of Tame , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tame was born in 1380, in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of John Tame and Jane Tilly. She married Nicholas De Semarc III in 1400, in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1450, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tame est née en 1380, à Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fille de John Tame et Jane Tilly. Elle a épousé Nicholas De Semarc III en 1400, à Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1450, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tame wurde 1380 in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England, als Tochter von John Tame und Jane Tilly geboren. Sie hat 1400 in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas De Semarc III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tame è nata il nel 1380 nel Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England come figlia di John Tame e Jane Tilly. Lei sposato Nicholas De Semarc III nel 1400, nel Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1450, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tameは1380年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルンハウでJohn TameとJane Tillyの娘として生まれた。1400年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルンハウでNicholas De Semarc IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルンハウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tame(은)는 1380년 영국 노르섬프토실르 토른하우그h에서 John Tame(와)과 Jane Tilly의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 토른하우그h에서 Nicholas De Semarc III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 토른하우그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tame nasceu em 1380, em Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de John Tame e Jane Tilly. Ela casou-se com Nicholas De Semarc III em 1400, em Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1450, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tame родилась в 1380 г. в местности таурно, нортамптоншир, Англия. Её родителей звали John Tame и Jane Tilly. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas De Semarc III в 1400 г. в местности таурно, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1450 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности таурно, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tame nació en 1380, en Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hija de John Tame y Jane Tilly. Se casó con Nicholas De Semarc III en 1400, en Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1450, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
